weekday_queries: what day of the week is it

reply.desktop.generic.failed: Desktop operation could not be completed.
reply.desktop.generic.dry_run: A test result was generated. No real desktop action was executed.
reply.desktop.generic.candidate_ready: A candidate was found and is waiting for the next step.
reply.desktop.generic.pending_choice: I found multiple candidates. Please choose one.
reply.desktop.generic.need_clarification: I need one more detail before continuing.
reply.desktop.generic.choice_invalid: The selection is invalid. Please choose again.
reply.desktop.generic.choice_ambiguous: The selection is not clear enough. Please choose by number.
reply.desktop.generic.unknown: The desktop operation has been handled.
reply.desktop.connection.not_enabled: Desktop connection is not enabled, so no real desktop action can be executed.
reply.desktop.connection.not_execution_mode: The current mode is not execution mode, so the real desktop action was blocked.
reply.desktop.connection.test_mode_only: The current mode is test mode. Only a test result was generated; no real action was executed.
reply.desktop.app.launch.pending_choice: I found multiple possible apps. Please choose one.
reply.desktop.app.launch.need_permission: I found "{target}", but it is not authorized yet. Please set its permission in the software area.
reply.desktop.app.launch.not_found: I could not find an executable object for "{target}" in software governance.
reply.desktop.app.launch.need_clarification: I am not sure which app you want to open. Please describe it more clearly, or choose from the candidates.
reply.desktop.app.launch.candidate_ready: The software object has been matched and is being reviewed by the Qin chain.
reply.desktop.app.launch.request_sent: Sent the launch request to Host: {target}.
reply.desktop.app.launch.done: The app launch request has been sent: {target}.
reply.desktop.app.launch.failed: The app launch request could not be completed: {target}.
reply.desktop.app.launch.permission_unset: The target is not authorized for execution yet. Please set its permission in the software governance area.
reply.desktop.app.close.plan_ready: The software close plan has been generated.
reply.desktop.app.close.pending_choice: I found multiple possible targets to close. Please choose one.
reply.desktop.app.close.need_confirmation: I am not fully sure which target to close. Do you want to close “{target}”?
reply.desktop.app.close.choice_resolved: The target to close has been selected.
reply.desktop.app.close.choice_cancelled: The close operation has been cancelled.
reply.desktop.app.close.choice_invalid: The close target selection is invalid. Please choose again.
reply.desktop.app.close.not_found: No running target software was found.
reply.desktop.app.close.blocked: The software close operation was blocked.
reply.desktop.app.close.need_heibingtai: Closing software requires Heibingtai target material. Direct close was refused.
reply.desktop.file.open.pending_choice: I found multiple possible files. Please choose which one to open.
reply.desktop.file.open.need_confirmation: I am not fully sure. Do you want to open “{target}”?
reply.desktop.file.open.need_permission: I found “{target}”, but it is not authorized to open. Please set permission in the file governance area.
reply.desktop.file.open.not_found: I could not find a file matching “{target}”. Please check the name or refresh the file list.
reply.desktop.file.close.pending_choice: I found multiple possible files to close. Please choose one.
reply.desktop.file.close.need_confirmation: I am not fully sure which file to close. Do you want to close “{target}”?
reply.desktop.file.close.not_found: No open target file was found.
reply.desktop.folder.open.pending_choice: I found multiple possible folders. Please choose which one to open.
reply.desktop.folder.open.not_found: I could not find a matching folder. Please check the name or refresh the list.
reply.desktop.folder.close.pending_choice: I found multiple possible folder windows to close. Please choose one.
reply.desktop.folder.close.not_found: No open target folder window was found.
reply.desktop.folder.close.done: The folder window has been closed: {target}.
reply.desktop.web.reserved: Web search is reserved and is not enabled in this version.
reply.desktop.capture.reserved: Screenshot and screen recording are reserved, but they are not enabled in the current version.
reply.desktop.system.weather.not_configured: Weather is not connected yet. Please configure a default city or weather service first.
